$comment: SQLite testfixture arc (F001A blocker clear, 2026-07-18): RUN witness for shipped <sys/uio.h> (sys/uio.json), the SUBDIRECTORY type-only descriptor that clears test1.c's F001A. `struct iovec` = { void*, size_t } injects with a 16-byte LP64 layout; iov_len(26) + sizeof(struct iovec)(16) = exit 42 — pinning the subdir resolution + struct injection + field layout structurally. NO readv/writev symbol (test1.c references only the struct — need-driven, zero eager-import over-ship). Three unix ABIs (POSIX header, availableObjectFormats:[elf,macho]): elf x86_64 + arm64 (Linux WSL/qemu run-green) + arm64-macho (macos-latest CI) — the struct layout is byte-identical on all, and a type-only descriptor has no link surface so the macho leg is pure-type-safe. NO pe arm: <sys/uio.h> fails loud on windows-pe (POSIX; test1.c's `#ifdef _WIN32` local struct is that shim). Release arm confirms the full shipped pipeline. RED-ON-DISABLE: delete sys/uio.json → header unresolved → compile fails; drop/rename a field → member undefined → compile fails; a lost field → sizeof 8 → exit 34.
